description_long: This is a rugged, boxy van with a dark green exterior, designed for utility and off-road capability. The van features a large, black metal roof rack spanning the entire roof, with a spare tire secured at the rear left corner. The windows are rectangular and tinted, with three on each side and a large windshield at the front. The front of the van has a protective grille guard and two round headlights, while the rear is equipped with dual ladders for roof access and two vertical taillights. The wheels are black and robust, suitable for rough terrain, and the bodywork shows signs of wear, suggesting heavy use. The overall design is utilitarian, with minimal decorative elements and a focus on practicality.
description: A rugged, dark green utility van with a full-length roof rack, spare tire, and robust black wheels. It features tinted windows, a protective grille, and dual rear ladders for roof access.
description_view_0: Front view showing the windshield, protective grille, round headlights, and the roof rack with a spare tire visible on top.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting three rectangular windows, the full-length roof rack, spare tire at the rear, and black wheels.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying dual ladders, two vertical taillights, the rear portion of the roof rack, and the spare tire.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, with three windows, roof rack, and black wheels, but no spare tire visible on this side.
attribute_car_manufacturer: UAZ (most likely, based on design cues)
attribute_door_configuration: two front doors, one sliding side door, two rear doors
